title: Banana Totem
description: This resource pack turns you Totem of Undying a banana for all your potassium cravings.
body: This resource pack turns you Totem of Undying a banana for all your potassium cravings. ![Banana Tetem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c70aec86b0c075a96a2dc0fb921c2ac1fcb1c2b7.png) - If you want to change the totem to anyting you like, - First download the latest version or the intended one. - Extract the file - Open the files inside untill you see the items folder - Go in it and place the image you want to make your totem look like. - Change the name to the same as the one next to it. - there you go, all set. ![Donations for BananaMan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/565e5b7d61412a4366da1f05a9ad7d72317c175a.png)
